allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v2/heartbeat" -TimeoutSec 3; "ChromaDB 응답: $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\($r.Content\)" } catch { "ChromaDB 응답 없음: $_" })
PowerShell($tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp.Connect\("localhost", 8000\); "포트 8000 열림" } catch { "포트 8000 닫힘" } finally { $tcp.Close\(\) })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $tcp = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $tcp.Connect\("localhost", 8000\); "ChromaDB 포트 8000 정상" } catch { "포트 8000 아직 미응답" } finally { $tcp.Close\(\) })

PowerShell($r = [System.Net.WebRequest]::Create\("http://localhost:8000/api/v2/heartbeat"\); $r.Method = "GET"; try { $resp = $r.GetResponse\(\); $stream = $resp.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); "v2 heartbeat: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" } catch { "v2 heartbeat 실패: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
